primary_outcomes: Evaluate the safety and tolerability of different oral doses of AND017 in the treatment of β-thalassemia subjects
secondary_outcome_groups: NTDT red blood cell and reticulocyte counts
NTDT red-cell indices including MCV, MCH, and MCHC
NTDT iron markers including transferrin, TSAT, ferritin, serum iron, and TIBC
TDT transfusion load and transfusion count
TDT proportion with at least 33% transfusion-load reduction
TDT duration of maintained transfusion-load reduction
records.title: A Study of Safety and Efficiency of AND017 in Patients With β-thalassemia
